title: Dansra Beezer
content:
{{Top|fa|canon=Beezer}} {{Otheruses|Beezer}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Corporal_beezer.jpg]] |name=Dansra Beezer |homeworld=[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Corporal Beezer}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]]{{CSWECite|I|66|Beezer, Corporal}} *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20081031.html|text="Fists of Ion"|int=Fists of Ion|newhost=Suvudu}} **[[New Republic Intelligence Service]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Sergeant Dansra Beezer.|Beezer, introducing herself to Lobar Aybock|}} '''Dansra Beezer''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|native]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. She was a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]], [[Technician/Legends|technician]], and communications specialist who trained under [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Brooks Carlson/Legends|Brooks Carlson]] to serve as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance commandos]]. In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Beezer was part of a [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]] sent to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] to deactivate the [[Endor shield generator bunker|planetary shield generator]] protecting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. A part of the strike team's [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] detachment, Beezer was responsible for communications. After arriving on Endor, Beezer and the strike team were separated from the command crew following encounters with Imperial [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] patrols. Eventually, they encountered an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] while making camp for the [[Standard day/Legends|night]]. Beezer, whose role included [[Jammer/Legends|jamming]] Imperial transmissions in case of emergencies, did so with the [[Walker/Legends|walker's]] transmissions. She later fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ended with the destruction of the [[SLD-26 planetary shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], allowing Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to destroy the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. At some point by [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Beezer served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Intelligence Service]]. She worked alongside her [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]], in a mission to suspend the [[Reuss Corporation]]'s rule over the planet [[Reuss VIII/Legends|Reuss VIII]] by aiding [[Calian]] [[Shockboxing/Legends|shockboxer]] [[Lobar Aybock]] in a match that the corporation had set him up to lose with the intent of subsequently selling his organs. Beezer worked as a slicer to protect Aybock from a hostile rival employed by [[Reussi]] [[Torel Vorne]] of the Reuss Corporation, whose intent was to ensure Aybock's [[Death/Legends|death]]. Ultimately, the New Republic succeeded in the mission, Aybock won his match, and the Reuss Corporation lost control of Reuss VIII, with the New Republic taking over the planet's government. ==Biography== ===Early life=== The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Dansra Beezer [[Alderaanian/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. She was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During that conflict, her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]{{Film|IV}} in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Beezer attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]], and she served as a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]], [[Technician/Legends|technician]], and communications specialist. [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Brooks Carlson/Legends|Brooks Carlson]] trained her to serve as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance commandos]]. ===Role in the Battle of Endor=== [[File:Corporal_Dansra_Beezer_TCGIE.png|thumb|left|250px|Beezer was a member of the Endor strike team's Renegade Squadron detachment.]] In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], the Alliance planned to [[Battle of Endor/Legends|attack]] the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], which was being constructed over the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. To actually destroy the [[Space station/Legends|station]], however, the Alliance first had to deactivate the [[SLD-26 planetary shield generator/Legends|SLD-26 planetary shield generator]] on Endor's surface, which was protecting the superweapon. Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] assembled a [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]] for the mission to Endor,{{Film|VI}} of which Beezer was a member. She was a part of the strike team's [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] component, responsible for communications and ordered to disrupt all Imperial transmissions in case of emergency.{{FactFile|44|END 11-14|The Battle of Endor}} Beezer and the rest of the strike team traveled to the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]] aboard the stolen Imperial [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T4a shuttle]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']], [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by Solo. Once it reached the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] construction site, the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was queried by the Imperial [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], which was in defensive orbit over Endor. However, Solo bypassed the ''Executor'' with the use of a stolen Imperial code, and the ''Tydirium'' was given clearance to land on the [[Forest/Legends|Forest]] [[Moon/Legends|Moon]]. After disembarking, Beezer and the strike team began scouting the area, but Solo and fellow command crew members [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], along with the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], eventually became separated from the main group after encounters with Imperial [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] patrols. Nevertheless, Solo ordered the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] to continue on. The squad made its way toward the [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator]] under the lead of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]].{{WEGCite|story=Night Attack|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi}} Upon [[Standard day/Legends|nightfall]], the squad made camp in a camouflaged shallow ravine, posting two sentries and setting up a [[blanket grid]] with its [[Scanner|scanning equipment]]. Shortly after the squad's first [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] shift, the scanners detected an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] moving toward the Rebels' location. Beezer [[Jammer/Legends|jammed]] the walker's transmissions, and another member, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Greeve (Human)|Greeve]], destroyed its spotlights with a [[Sniper rifle/Legends|sniper rifle]]. The squad circled the walker to keep it off balance, and the group's [[Medic/Legends|medic]], Corporal [[Delevar]], fired a [[Smoke canister/Legends|smoke canister]] into the AT-ST's [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] [[Window/Legends|window]] when it began firing randomly. The resulting smoke explosion forced the walker's crew to abandon the vehicle and surrender to the strike team. After capturing the Imperials, the squad forced the walker pilot to make a [[Comm unit/Legends|comm]] check-in at [[Blaster/Legends|blasterpoint]]. The squad continued on to the rendezvous point, forcing the walker pilot to make several more check-ins along the way to explain the scout walker's absence. [[File:Ds2destroyed.png|thumb|right|250px|The strike team's destruction of the deflector shield enabled Rebel starfighters to destroy the second Death Star itself.]] Solo and the others then rejoined the squad, having allied themselves with the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Bright Tree Village tribe|tribe]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], who showed the [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] a route to the [[Planetary shield/Legends|shield generator]] bunker's backdoor. The commandos proceeded into the structure, only to be ambushed by [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]], the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Legion/Legends|legion]] stationed on the moon, and subsequently captured and led back outside. Their capture proved short-lived, however, when the Ewoks attacked the Imperial [[Troop/Legends|troops]], eventually turning the tide of the battle in favor of the Rebel Alliance. The strike team successfully destroyed the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] with the use of [[7-PrG proton grenade]]s.''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' With the Death Star's [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] demolished, Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] destroyed the battlestation. ===Service in the New Republic=== {{Quote|It's gotta be a fair fight. Both ways.''"
"''All right, I promise.|Loybar Aybock and Beezer|}} At some point following the Battle of Endor, Beezer was promoted to the rank of sergeant. She served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Intelligence Service]] sometime by [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. During that period,''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates {{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20081031.html|text="Fists of Ion"|int=Fists of Ion|newhost=Suvudu}} to [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. on the planet [[Reuss VIII/Legends|Reuss VIII]], [[Calian]] [[Shockboxing/Legends|shockboxer]] [[Lobar Aybock]] agreed to a contract with the [[Reussi]] [[Torel Vorne]] and the [[Reuss Corporation]], in which he would face off in a title match against the shockboxer [[Tull Raine]]. Major Derlin met with Aybock, revealing information about Vorne privately auctioning the shockboxer's organs as well as setting up a slicer to disable Aybock's [[GolanGear]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] during the match to ensure the Calian's [[Death/Legends|death]]. The Intelligence Service's involvement would help the New Republic suspend the Reuss Corporation's operations, which had laid waste to the planet's citizens and environment over the last twenty years. As part of Derlin's team, Beezer's job was to work remotely as a slicer to counter Vorne's efforts. Aybock agreed to help Derlin but only on the condition that the fight with Raine be a fair one and that he be given no advantage by Beezer. The day of the match, Vorne traced Beezer's signal and sent a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] to kill her. However, [[Tisocco]], the team's [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], successfully defended Beezer from the assassin, which proved to be the mission's only complication. Aybock won the match, and the New Republic's mission succeeded, with the Reuss Corporation's operations suspended pending judiciary investigation and Vorne running from an arrest warrant and several [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]. The New Republic took over Reuss VIII's government with the intent of returning the planet to its agricultural roots. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|And [I thought] all shockboxers are brain-dead.|Beezer, to Lobar Aybock|}} A slicer and technician, Dansra Beezer became nervous anytime Han Solo tried to hotwire something. When first meeting Lobar Aybock, Beezer straightened up as if she had been previously bored right before getting to introduce herself. She insisted on mentioning her rank in the introduction. Beezer was initially cool to Aybock and retorted with a derogatory comment on shockboxers after the Calian made a comment making fun of slicers. However, she looked at Aybock in a different manner after he insisted on Beezer not giving him an unfair advantage in the fight. She had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin. ==Equipment== During her service with the Endor strike team, Beezer wore the forest camouflage [[Uniform|gear]] of the team's members. She was armed with an [[A280 blaster rifle/Legends|A280 blaster rifle]],[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 7|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 7]] along with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]].{{DB|character|beezer|Beezer, Dansra}} ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Strike_Team_promo.jpg|thumb|right|250px|One of the promotional photos of Beezer and other strike team members, shown standing aboard the Death Star with Luke Skywalker]] Dansra Beezer originally appeared in promotional photos for the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']],''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' though it is unclear whether she appears in the film itself. The photos, featured in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|CD-ROM]] ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'', show Beezer and other Rebel commandos standing aboard the second Death Star with Luke Skywalker and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Although uncredited, stuntwoman [[Tracey Eddon]] portrayed the character.{{Blogspot|subdomain=starwarsaficionado|url=2010/09/classic-image-rebel-assembly.html|name=Star Wars Aficionado|text=CLASSIC IMAGE: REBEL ASSEMBLY!}} In [[1990]], a commando named Beezer was mentioned in the short story ''[[Night Attack]]'', published in ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]''.{{WEGCite|story=Night Attack|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi}} The release of the [[1999]] ''[[Endor Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] established Beezer as the female Rebel commando from the ''Return of the Jedi'' production photos. In [[2008]], Beezer appeared in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]-exclusive short story ''[[Fists of Ion]]'', written by "[[What's The Story?]]" author [[Edward M. Erdelac]]. In that story, she was first given the first name Dansra, although her name was alternatively spelled as "Dansra" and "Dransa" throughout the story. By Erdelac's own admission, her first name was a [[tuckerization]] of his wife's first name. He also felt that Beezer's promotion to sergeant would be a logical progression after her role in the Battle of Endor.{{Blog|caledre25|23|Endnotes For Fists Of Ion: Memoirs Of A Champion Shockboxer by Lobar Aybock, Chapter VII: Hard Raine}} Beezer was also given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released later in 2008, being referred to as a him. As the character is referred to as a her in ''Endor Limited'' in an [[in-universe]] concurrent time, and Beezer is also referred to as a her in the chronologically later ''Fists of Ion'', this article treats the ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' pronoun reference as an error. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Night Attack|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20081031.html|text="Fists of Ion"|int=Fists of Ion|newhost=Suvudu}} {{1stID|Dansra}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Dansra Beezer}} *''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' {{Po}} *{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Corporal Beezer}} *{{GamerCite|7|Deck Plans}} *{{FactFile|44|END 11-14|The Battle of Endor}} *{{FactFile|65|END 21-24|The Battle of Endor – Delevar's Debut}} *{{FactFile|136|GAR 19-20|Garments and Couture}} {{Po}} *{{Blog|caledre25|23|Endnotes For Fists Of Ion: Memoirs Of A Champion Shockboxer by Lobar Aybock, Chapter VII: Hard Raine}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|7|Droids, Aliens & Creatures}} {{Po}} *{{SWArchive|url=fans/media/womenofsw/index.html?page=4|text=The Women of the Original ''Star Wars'' Trilogy}} *{{DB|character|beezer|Beezer, Dansra}} *{{SWE|groups|rebel-troopers|Rebel Troopers}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile2014|29|4 ABY 33-40|The Battle of Endor}} *{{FFGTCG|set=Imperial Entanglements|cardname=Corporal Dansra Beezer|link=imperial-entanglements/corporal-dansra-beezer-r1396}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dansra Beezer |nl=Dansra Beezer }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Beezer, Dansra}} [[Category:Alderaanians]] [[Category:Endor strike team personnel]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Renegade Squadron personnel]] [[Category:Scouts]] [[Category:Slicers]]
